programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula

programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.desc: The MSO family takes on a group that calls themselves the Mid Atlantic Street Outlaws. They've got some of the nicest cars Memphis has seen in a while, including a doorless dragster. On top of that, they bring some hustle into the racers' meeting.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Roaring Back To Life
programme.desc: As the winter ice thaws, Idaho's River of No Return flows, and the people living on its violent shores navigate the raging spring rapids. The small community hustles to work, so they can survive another season in this rugged and dangerous backcountry.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Bearing Down on the Ranch
programme.desc: A predatory bear stalks a homestead forcing the rancher to aggressively protect himself and his cattle. A jetboat engine failure in the river rapids puts Buck's operation in jeopardy. A violent storm forces bush pilots to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Rapid Response
programme.desc: When a rafter goes overboard, a legendary jetboat captain springs into action to save the man before the river's rapids claim another victim. Heavy rains threaten to destroy Aubrey's ranch. She calls in air support to help save her barn.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Lost Treasure of Panther Key
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer head to southwest Florida in search of the long-lost loot of pirate Jose Gaspar. The brothers leave no stone unturned as they hunt for the $30 million treasure said to be hidden somewhere along the coast.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Vanished Confederate Treasure
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer head to Virginia in search of the long-lost Confederacy treasury. The brothers trek through the unforgiving terrain of the Appalachian Mountains in hopes of putting the 150-year-old mystery to rest.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: The Curse of El Dorado
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer are on the road to El Dorado. Using clues left behind by legendary explorer Percy Fawcett, the brothers head deep into the Amazon jungle to find key landmarks that could lead them to the lost City of Gold.

programme.title: Code of the Wild: Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Casey and Chris Keefer trek into the heart of Alaska to recover a plane that disappeared while carrying two American politicians. The brothers battle the elements and conquer glaciers as they attempt to solve the 47-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Man Who Saved the World, Man in a Box and From the Depths of Hell

programme.desc: Don Wildman examines a gambling geek, a golden experiment and a fearless heroine.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Swimming the Channel, Breaking the Bank and Canyon Survivor
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores a woman's quest for athletic glory, uncovers a bizarre use of the U.S. Postal Service and investigates one man's will to survive against all odds.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Hank Williams, Glowing Soldiers and Iceman Cometh
programme.desc: Don Wildman investigates the death of a country music legend, examines surgical tools linked to a baffling medical mystery and uncovers the truth behind the oldest cold case in human history.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum: Boston Marathon Cheat, Beast of Bodmin, and the Naked President
programme.desc: Don Wildman uncovers the truth behind one of the most audacious hoaxes in sports history, investigates the preserved remains of a terrifying beast, and inspects a watch linked to a presidential scandal.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Brendon and McKenna

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Larissa and Anthony

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andrea, Alex and Andrea
programme.desc: Fans of popular YouTube star, Andrea Russett, summon Nev and Max to help catch a potential stalker who is impersonating Andrea's family online. The guys soon uncover a web of fake profiles much larger than they thought possible.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Antwane and Tony
programme.desc: Carmen is concerned about her cousin Antwane's three-year romance with a man named Tony. Antwane lives a virtually pre-digital age existence making Tony's true identity difficult to reveal.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kaden and Adriana
programme.desc: Nev and co-host Kamie Crawford help lovestruck Kaden figure out if his four-year relationship with sexy Adriana is real. What's crazy is Kaden actually met Adriana IRL.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Resee and Brendan

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Ross and Jordan
programme.desc: As an aspiring stand-up comedian in Brooklyn, NY, Ross couldn't believe his luck when he started dating the girl of his dreams, Jordan. Unfortunately four months ago, the love of his life ghosted him.

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Kayla and Shawn

programme.title: Ghosted: Love Gone Missing: Giovanna and Dante
programme.desc: Giovanna immigrated from Spain to the U.S. two years ago and met the love of her life in Dante. But nine months ago, Dante ghosted her without any explanation.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Michael and Chanelle

programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Snowball
programme.desc: At a ski shop, Michael demonstrates the latest in winter gear: a hat that also makes hot coco. And later, when taking inventory at an abandoned garage, Michael stuns his co-worker when a ghostly violin strikes a chord, all by itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud First Look
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Menu

programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: American Dad!: Man in the Moonbounce

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: Canadian Horror
programme.desc: From Canada's waterlogged wilderness comes stories of a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans. Freshwater detective Jeremy Wade tries to track down this shadowy predator with a mouth said to resemble a bear-trap.

programme.title: River Monsters: South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: In Fiji, people are coming under attack from unseen assailants in the water, but it's not clear if there are multiple culprits or a single persistent perpetrator. Jeremy Wade battles tropical storms and thick jungle in an all-out search for a culprit.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Snakehead

programme.title: River Monsters: Alligator Gar
programme.desc: Profiling a dangerous fish roaming the waters of the Deep South.

programme.desc: Travel with the Irwins to find the creatures that are running rampant in the Australian bush and are upsetting the ecological balance of the country. From foxes to feral cats to rabbits, Steve and Terri set out to locate and round them up.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Cuddly Kittens
programme.desc: Toyger kitten Tonya overcomes her shy nature to befriend a large housemate.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cat Fight!
programme.desc: Penny Lane is a crazed cat that hates Laura's roommate, Lizzy, and attacks her at every opportunity.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: Give a Dog a Home: Live!
programme.desc: There are thousands of animals in shelters across the U.S. in need of good, loving homes. Now Animal Planet, with Best Friends Animal Society, wants to connect these animals directly to our viewers, live and in real time.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The One
programme.desc: Tia and her staff scramble to coax a scared dog, hiding under a vehicle, to safety. Tania's in-laws are seeking a new addition to their home. Tia's son Moe and his fiancée Lizzy prepare for their wedding day.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: Movie: South Central
programme.desc: A veteran gang member is determined to spare his son from the ravages of gang life.

programme.title: The Family Business: We Are at War

programme.title: The Family Business: The Games Have Just Begun
programme.desc: The Duncans' shipment has been hijacked. Alejandro flies across country to demand his son's return. Sal Dash makes Harris an offer. LC reveals the secret behind the Duncan family business.

programme.title: The Family Business: Show Down

programme.title: The Family Business: Answered Questions
programme.desc: The Duncans are still dealing with the ramifications of the past. Vinnie Dash, the only remaining son of Sal, is still on the loose and dangerous. LC's grandson, Nevada is starting to ask questions that make his grandparents nervous.

programme.title: The Family Business: The Heat Is On

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The FBI
programme.desc: It is America's most powerful police force, made up of an elite team of Special Agents secretly patrolling the nation - and the world.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The White House
programme.desc: An inside look at the secret protocols, elite security and hidden history of the world's most public of private residences. But more guarded than the White House itself are its secrets.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Presidential Cover-Ups
programme.desc: This episode looks beyond the headlines to uncover the real stories behind the greatest White House scandals. Former presidential advisors, historians and journalists will reveal how much secrecy exists within the White House.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Scientology
programme.desc: As one of the most secret organizations in America, Scientology has more than 100,000 followers. Learn about the origins, doctrine, language, and celebrity allure of this wealthy and influential institution.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Pentagon
programme.desc: It is the epicenter of America's military operations. A five-sided fortress with a single purpose to defend the United States and its citizens.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: American Nazis
programme.desc: There are nearly 200 neo-Nazi groups in America, covertly monitored by the government. Past and present Nazi members, journalists, academics and law enforcement experts describe the U.S. secret Nazi past and the present day inner workings.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Drug Wars
programme.desc: This episode uncovers the conspiracies behind America's 40-year drug campaign. A congressman, DEA officers and hip-hop mogul speak out about this debate.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Fort Knox
programme.desc: Fort Knox is one of the most secure structures in the world and safeguards the vast wealth of the United States. We unlock the secret contents, political controversy, and cutting edge security hidden behind the gates of the world's most famous vault.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Secret Underground
programme.desc: Take a look at the tunnels, cities and fortresses covertly constructed beneath the feet of the American public, including Mt. Weather, an underground bunker used to house high-ranking officials and secret underground rail systems.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: The Monuments

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Enchanted Islands
programme.desc: A nation of more than 100 million people on a collection of over 7,600 islands all set in the warm emerald seas of the Pacific Ocean, the Philippines is a land of sparkling wonder.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Wild Paradise
programme.desc: Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. Also, meet a man who has done much to help the Philippine Tarsier.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Land of Dragons
programme.desc: Central Indonesia is a wild, volcanic world where life thrives and dragons rule.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Islands of Monsters
programme.desc: The western Indonesian islands of Borneo and Sumatra are home to rare species.

programme.title: Wild Indonesia: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Papua's lost worlds support one of the richest concentrations of life on our planet.

programme.title: Predator Fail: The Hunting Game
programme.desc: There is no greater predatory testing ground than the African savannah. Its greatest hunters, the lion, Nile crocodile and cheetah, are at the top of the pile here. Predator hunts prey, predator wins.

programme.title: Predator Fail: Seek and Destroy
programme.desc: Follow some of the planets strangest hunters through their hunting trials and tribulations as they target and stalk prey.

programme.title: Predator Fail: Deep Water Death Match
programme.desc: Underwater, speed and strategy are key to making the kill. Ocean hunters have aced the aquatic hunting games, but, even for the top players, things don't always go according to plan.

programme.title: Predators in Paradise: Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Explore the ever-increasing instances of animal attacks as humans encroach on them.

programme.title: Predator in Paradise: In the Shallows
programme.desc: Predators fight for survival in tropical paradise.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the dark secrets of Egypt's strange half-man, half-lion beast, revealing why the pharaohs were so intent on transforming into this powerful and ferocious monster.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mysteries of the Killer Stars
programme.desc: New discoveries uncover the deadly behaviours of the universe's most mysterious stars, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the strange breed of killer stars that are hurtling through space.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Stars That Kill
programme.desc: The universe is home to real-life Death Stars that could destroy planet Earth. The latest science reveals the terrifying secrets of NASA's six deadliest: vampire stars, supernovas that can vaporize a planet, and unpredictable stars gone rogue.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When Supernovas Strike
programme.desc: Supernovas are the violent death of giant stars, and new discoveries reveal that these cataclysmic events create the elements that are essential to all life in the universe.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret World of Nebulas
programme.desc: Nebulas are the strange structures of cosmic gas and dust where stars are born and die, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of these mysterious places.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Death Star
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star. New evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space. When a cuting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Red Planet
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why. A declassified document reveals a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. A NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Pritchert
programme.desc: Craig Pritchert and his girlfriend are a modern day Bonnie and Clyde. After falling in love, the two go on a bank robbery spree, and flee the country with $500,000 in cash. After being spotted in Cape Town, the FBI sends a team to take the two down.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch is living large with a wife and baby. His practice is booming, he loves to spend money on houses, exotic cars, and exotic dancers who become mistresses.

programme.title: Diabolical: Queen of Deception
programme.desc: 2011 is off to a rocky start when a beloved Susanville police officer is found dead. What first looks like suicide morphs into a full blown murder investigation when his wife becomes a suspect and detectives uncover a story of love, lust and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In Jason's Name
programme.desc: An Irish businessman is killed by his American au-pair-turned-wife and her father. They claim self-defence. The dead man’s sister fights to clear his name.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: 48 Hours: In Jason's Name
programme.desc: An Irish businessman is killed by his American au-pair-turned-wife and her father. They claim self-defence. The dead man’s sister fights to clear his name.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Devil in the Dance Hall
programme.desc: A murder within the small square dancing community of Texarkana, Arkansas leads investigators through a gauntlet of suspects with alibies and potential motives- including love triangles, jealousy and lots of money.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Family Lies
programme.desc: A reunited family begins to point fingers at each other when a house fire kills one of their own. And somewhere in the ashes are the clues to a murder.

programme.title: Murder Loves Company: Nightmare on Bennington Drive
programme.desc: This quaint neighbourhood in Jacksonville, Florida seems to be an unlikely place for any crime at all, let alone murder.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Dear Dad
programme.desc: When beloved New England handyman Jack Reid becomes the victim of a violent murder, police have no choice but to look for a killer among his many clients and adoring family. The suspect they ultimately uncover is a sociopath that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Single mom Christina Sanoubane, leaves Jacob Crosson, her abusive boyfriend and father of her two year old son Corbin, to move into her own apartment. But four days later when a friend comes to visit her, Corbin greets him with the words: 'Mommy's dead.'

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Deadly Drive
programme.desc: The investigation into 26-year-old Kim Medlin's mysterious disappearance reveals secrets that shatter the safety and security of everyone in the tight-knit town of Monroe, North Carolina.

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Family Fatale
programme.desc: Ruie Ann Park is the J.R. Ewing of Van Buren, AR – wealthy and sharp-tongued, but fair. She rules with her town with wit and flair, until her son's increasingly scandalous lifestyle and others' lust for her money bring her to a bitter, horrific end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Football Fatale
programme.desc: Star Washington Redskins safety Sean Taylor is shot dead by an intruder in his Miami home. And when it comes to the rich and famous, it seems like everybody has a motive...

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: When it comes to military hardware, tough is what keeps you alive. Take a look at the toughest military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: Whether the fight is on land, sea or in the air, one factor can be totally decisive: surprise. Getting the drop on your opponent can win the fight before it's begun. We're counting down the top ten stealthiest war machines across every class of weapon.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Maximum Horsepower
programme.desc: Whether the battle is fought on land, sea or air there is one thing that every war machine needs: power.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower
programme.desc: A showcase of the heaviest hitting military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Long Range Strikers
programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Maximum Horsepower

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Cowboys vs. Hollywood
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: No Liars Allowed
programme.desc: We'll reveal the true stories behind America's most infamous bad guys, and uncover the truths behind America's notorious secret societies.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Wild Rock Pavilion
programme.desc: The builders work with three centuries of materials and techniques in one project. Using custom 21st century steel brackets and hand-hewn 19th century beams, they create a pavilion for the Wild Rock Community Center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Island Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the Barnwood Builders take the logs from season 3's Bird's-Eye Barn across the New River and put them back together on a West Virginia island.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Moving a Pre-Civil War Log Cabin From West Virginia to Tennessee
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a pre-Civil War log cabin in Braxton County, West Virginia. They take it back to Lewisburg to refurbish the logs, then rebuild it for a client who collects historic homes in Elizabethton, Tennessee.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: West Virginia Legacy Cabin
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his crew work on saving the O'Dell family's hand-hewn log home. Mark also spends some time with his own father and visits a log cabin built by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Picture Perfect Cabin
programme.desc: Mark's client has a painting of a log cabin he wants to replicate so the team sets out to find the perfect cabin for the job. After settling on a cabin from an old project, the Barnwood Builders rebuild the structure with its huge logs in Texas.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mountaineer Volunteers
programme.desc: Mark donates a timber frame to his alma mater, West Virginia University, as the latest addition to their pioneer heritage center.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Finished Product
programme.desc: Mark Bowe visits finished cabins he helped build in Montana, Texas, South Carolina, West Virginia and North Carolina. Then, there's a big surprise waiting for him in Gatlinburg, Tennessee.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Bon-Appé-Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and his brigade de cuisine cook up a dining room treehouse for a French restaurant.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Home Tree Home
programme.desc: A treehouse escape grows into a full-time live-in treehouse when Pete lays eyes on the gargantuan Sitka spruce of his dreams for a hexagonal build on the coast of Oregon.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Party Pad
programme.desc: Pete heads to the Platte River Valley of eastern Nebraska to build a magical, towering treetop castle for a family that has decided to never grow up.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Des Moines, IA
programme.desc: Casey heads to Des Moines, Iowa, where he'll attempt to eat an overstuffed pulled pork sandwich slathered in a scorpion pepper hot sauce in ten minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolicious

programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall criss-crosses America to scare up some ghoulishly good grub and tricked-out treats, including mouth-watering zombie burgers in Atlanta, colossal freak shakes in Salem, Mass., and monstrous Franken-chops in New Orleans.

programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder-Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Drone Wife Cheat

programme.desc: Brenda's squad picks up a case from Hollywood involving the brutal murder of an aspiring actress who made a date through an online service. Meanwhile, Brenda prepares for an interview with the mayor to become the next Chief of Police.

programme.title: The Closer: Executive Order
programme.desc: The murder of two paramedics leads the LSPD and the FBI on two separate investigations on a case that could be the precursor to a major terrorist attack. Brenda fights to remain a step ahead while working with the counter-terrorism unit.

programme.title: The Closer: Old Money
programme.desc: One of Brenda's detectives is ambushed on the street and the main clue to figuring out the motive behind the attack is a garbage bag containing more than $37,500.

programme.title: The Closer: High Crimes
programme.desc: Chief of police Tommy Delk assigns Major Crimes a seemingly minor case involving the armed robbery of several medical marijuana dispensaries. When one of the robberies turns into a murder, the case tests Brenda's readiness to move up in the department.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Shoes
programme.desc: An attorney crosses paths with a boy on Christmas Eve and rediscovers the meaning of life.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Arrangement
programme.desc: A rivalry heats up during a floral competition which leads to an unlikely romance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Deadly Bite

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: An epic Clash of Titans grips the gold mining fleet as Shawn constructs the largest washplant in Nome and Ken's mining monster roars to life. Vern prospects using his new innovations. Ripping currents threaten the Kellys.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Sound of Money
programme.desc: Vernon and his crew get stranded in the Yukon. Shawn finds a good luck charm in his son. Ken suffers a mechanical setback and Emily sends rookie diver Chase underwater.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Shawn is getting closer to his mega-dredge dreams, while the Kelly's gold count is struggling. Captain Emily fights for her spot against the competition and Vernon is 500 miles into his journey for gold.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Guts and Gravel
programme.desc: Before the winter freeze out, Shawn gambles to dig deeper than ever before as Ken brings the heat. The Kellys restart from scratch with a new dredge design. Emily aims to work nonstop.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: A Lesson in Perseverance
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is devastated after a landslide wipes out months of hard work in mere minutes. Later, Dustin's perseverance is put to the test when his promising new site doesn't produce, causing his crew to question his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Guts and Gravel
programme.desc: Before the winter freeze out, Shawn gambles to dig deeper than ever before as Ken brings the heat. The Kellys restart from scratch with a new dredge design. Emily aims to work nonstop.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Rush of Rocks and Rig
programme.desc: When the Dakota Boys dig down to bedrock they hit the biggest boulder of the season. Dustin is forced to rig a new mechanical solution, the Graboid. A flash flood racing down McKinley Creek threatens to kill the crew and destroy their operation.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Bering Sea is now the Wild West as Shawn and Kris battle encroaching miners. Ken's beastly Myrtle Irene continues to invade and operating costs soar. Emily expands her operation but an air malfunction threatens her season.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Breaking the Code
programme.desc: A cold snap threatens Mark and Digger's handmade vodka. For Mark Rogers, breaking the moonshiner code can come at a steep price. And Tim Smith risks a big run of Tickle's double rye to put the woods back into his shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hillbilly Hack
programme.desc: Mark and Digger build a hillbilly hack to save their handmade vodka. Pam may know more than she thinks about Popcorn's lost shine. Nothing but trouble for Josh running a still outside of the woods. Patti and David risk a seaplane bootleg on the bayou.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Risky Whiskey
programme.desc: Josh and Bill rebuild bigger and better. Lance takes a risk on a new kind of whiskey, while Jeff and Mark prep their indoor still site. Tickle and crew battle the elements in Kentucky. Tim gives the North Carolina distillery a backwoods makeover.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Trouble with Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle returns to Tim's legal distillery and discovers he's traded one prison for another. Mark and Digger unearth a trove of Popcorn's shine. Josh finds an untapped market at a biker rally, only to learn the cost of entry is more than the ticket price.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashionably Late
programme.desc: While Randy's in Barcelona showing his second collection, Chelsea's princess dream dress goes missing from the store and crazy rich Asian bride Cheryl finds fault with every gown she sees.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Flight
programme.desc: Pnina megafan Julianna wants the sexiest dress ever but her fiancé's family are afraid she'll say yes to a dress she'll regret. Plus, jumpsuit enthusiast Randell wants a wedding onesie - too bad Randy and Lisa can't find any.

programme.title: OutDaughtered
programme.desc: Follow the Busbys' journey of infertility, pregnancy and adjusting to life with all-female quintuplets.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quint Tested, Parent Approved
programme.desc: As the Quints prepare for end-of-the-year testing to determine their class placement next year, fears of Parker's anxiety return. Scheduling conflicts cause tension as the Busbys struggle to balance their growing businesses with their already busy lives.

programme.title: Counting On: The Vuolos Take LA
programme.desc: Jeremy and Jinger explore LA with some new friends, where Jinger discusses her decision to wear pants, which is an unusual thing for Duggar women to do.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Nightmare on Quint Street
programme.desc: It's Halloween, but before the Busby’s can celebrate the Quints' first trick-or-treat outing, they must race to find costumes, shop for pumpkins and get the new house ready for a Halloween party, all while making a final decision on a $100,000 investment.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Not So Quiet Riot
programme.desc: When the Busbys agree to no more naps for the Quints, the results threaten to push Danielle to the edge as she deals with a house full of cranky 4-year-olds. Meanwhile, Adam and the girls try to come up with the perfect Mother's Day gift for Danielle.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quint Tested, Parent Approved
programme.desc: As the Quints prepare for end-of-the-year testing to determine their class placement next year, fears of Parker's anxiety return. Scheduling conflicts cause tension as the Busbys struggle to balance their growing businesses with their already busy lives.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Born Together, Stay Together
programme.desc: Weeding through rumours for 15 years, a woman is determined to uncover the truth of her biological mother, only to find many more unexpected family secrets. Identical twin sisters search for their biological mother, unsure if she's even alive.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: All the Leaves Fell off My Family Tree
programme.desc: A woman's world is shaken when she discovers at 25 that she was adopted. As she searches for her birth mother, more dramatic revelations are in store. A mother is in a race against time to find her son, whom she put up for adoption 46 years ago.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Busting at the Seams
programme.desc: Casey and Ethan grapple with the reality that they have too much stuff to fit into their new, much smaller home.

programme.title: Quints by Surprise: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: Casey creates fun and unique ways to capture the babies growing up.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Very Busby Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's My Potty and I'll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: The Busbys return to the world of potty training, determined to succeed this time. Blayke takes gymnastics lessons spends some one-on-one time with her parents. Mimi distances herself from the family, struggling with the loss of her house.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hiccup Circus
programme.desc: A circus sword-swallower suffers from a persistent case of hiccups. A mother and daughter mysteriously collapse in the ER, for completely different reasons. A woman loses control of her legs at her daughter's graduation.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deadly Sore Throat
programme.desc: A wheezing woman comes to the ER with a difficult-to-diagnose problem and a very angry husband; a grown man suddenly begins acting like a child; a birthday party goes bad as the whole family comes to the ER deathly ill.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.desc: A pair of charismatic entrepreneurs from Los Angeles swim around offers for their device that prevents objects from slipping through what Mark Cuban calls the 'carmuter triangle' -- that gap between the car seat and center console.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Murr and Joe take name-calling to new heights, the guys ask for bogus donations, and the night's big loser gets a shave that's too close for comfort.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: The Misery Index: That Milk Must Have Turned by Now

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect
programme.desc: Joe and Q become 'gentlemen', a little piggy goes to the emergency room, and a man rides the elevator from hell as a clumsy paramedic and accidental sexter battle to be masters of misery.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss

programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Adam debunks the fake moon landing theory, discusses the Satanic Panic of the 1980s and reveals how to spot a false theory.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Lady Boss Lemur
programme.desc: Chester's bachelor pad of lemurs is about to be in for a shock with a female on her way. Lemur females are dominant, so their peaceful existence may come to an end. A novice zebra starts to make a play for power, which isn't to zebra Florence's liking.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Behind Bars
programme.desc: Tia enlists Matt's help adopting a patrol dog out to his former home, Dixon prison. Then, Tia gets a call about two dogs left behind when their owners abandoned the property. And, Tania has trouble letting go when Brandi is up for adoption.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: When a tornado tears through New Orleans, Tania takes charge but is furious when the parolees fail to show up to help. A fellow pit bull trainer seeks Tia's help adopting a dog she can put to work.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Risky Business

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger
programme.desc: The ferocious Tasmanian Tiger was declared extinct 80 years ago, yet sightings are still reported. A trio of experts venture into Tasmania's undeveloped wilderness in search of one of the most unique and terrifying predators ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Floodpocalypse Now
programme.desc: Danny tries to score an ex-police motorcycle without getting busted, while a water main break threatens to put the shop permanently under water.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Van-Tastic
programme.desc: Danny is so proud of the van he restored for his bandmate John Zito that he decides to give his own classic van a make-over. Later, Danny and Kevin pull over an NBA star and Danny gets some ink of his own.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Horseplay
programme.desc: A high wire performer wants Danny to build a bike to commemorate his career and the records he has broken, and an Extreme Cowboy Racer wants the world's coolest trailer tricked out for her racing partner, Honey the Horse.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Charger Surprise
programme.desc: Danny decides to feature the 12 favourite cars in his collection in an official Count's Kustoms calendar, and later, a customer wants Danny to build him a classic Charger just like his dad used to have.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Calendar
programme.desc: The huge photo shoot day for the Count's Kustoms calendar is approaching. Danny has decided to have his guys each find, and take a picture with, their dream car for the back cover.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Flamin' and Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Danny wants Ryan to fix a bad flame job on his beloved police cruiser that's been sitting in the shop for years. A customer asks Shannon to restore his 1979 Iron Head Sportster that's more a pile of parts than a bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Ready, Set, Van Gogh!
programme.desc: Ryan is challenged to paint a Harley Trike in the spirit of Van Gogh's 'Starry Night.' Kevin finds a car that could be one the most valuable ones Danny has ever seen, if it's an original.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mo' Parts Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Danny is doubly-blessed when a his-and-hers restoration is commissioned for a 1970 Plymouth Road Runner and a 1970 Dodge Coronet. Plus, Roli hopes to become the next airbrusher, but Ryan and Mike have other plans for him.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part One
programme.desc: Danny is inspired to take back on an old project that he's already sunk a lot of time and money into. For the shop to make any profit on the 1967 Ford Bronco, they will have to turn it around quickly.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Bucks and Broncos Part Two
programme.desc: Danny has a customer all lined up to buy his 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring, but Ryan's mistake has set the project way back. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli settle a score at a gun range with Shannon keeping the peace.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Black, White and Hotrod All Over
programme.desc: Danny and the boys meet with a customer who wants a wicked paint job to match his 1959 Anglia dragster. Meanwhile, Shannon and Ryan are building a custom Harley Davidson Bagger for a client using a repurposed police bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Blinged Out Blazer
programme.desc: Danny's got himself a new ride, a classic two-wheel drive Chevy Blazer that he wants to trick out and flip for a big profit. Painter Ryan wants to try out a new twist on a retro flame design, but Danny is worried that it will look too 'Miami Vice.'

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sweet Lambo of Mine
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses guitarist DJ Ashba arrives at Count's Kustoms in a 2004 Lamborghini Murcielago that he wants turned into the ultimate 'mancar,' but Danny must make sure he includes something special for DJ's wife.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang
programme.desc: Danny gets hired to do a full bumper-to-bumper restoration on a '66 Mustang Convertible. Unfortunately, when the car is stripped down, they find there's not a whole lot of car between the bumpers.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mangled Mustang
programme.desc: Danny and the team continue wrestling with the stock restoration Mustang mess, hoping for some extra funds and a lot of patience from their client.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Finders Keepers
programme.desc: Danny acquires a '74 Ford f100 he can't wait to trick out and flip for a big profit. But after the Count falls in love with the truck and decides he wants to keep it, Kevin must sell it before Danny catches on.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chevy Truck Tribute
programme.desc: A family brings in an old pickup truck to be restored in memory of their mom, and Danny needs to figure out how to build the perfect tribute vehicle without blowing the budget. Later on, he finds a rare old Oldsmobile 442 that the owner wants to sell.

programme.title: Jessie: Quitting Cold Koala
programme.desc: Luke decides that it's time to give up Kenny, his stuffed koala. He tries to spend one night without Kenny and gives him to Jessie to take care of. When Kenny is accidentally damaged overnight, Stuart performs emergency 'surgery' to put him together.

programme.title: Jessie: All the Knight Moves
programme.desc: When Jessie discovers that Zuri is a chess prodigy, she urges her to compete in a renowned competition. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma suspect that Bertram was once a jewel thief.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Camp Kiki-slasher
programme.desc: An investigation begins when the campers start to mysteriously disappear one by one.

programme.title: Bunk'd: In Your Wildest Screams
programme.desc: Gwen warns everyone that her dream effigy doll, Cuddles, can cause nightmares. The others laugh, but it doesn't take long to realize Cuddles' true power.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Baxtercism of Levi Grayson
programme.desc: Booker and Levi try to prank a classmate into thinking their apartment building is haunted. Meanwhile, Nia gets chickenpox and Tess comes up with a plan to make sure her BFF doesn't miss out on Halloween.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Creepin' It Real
programme.desc: When Booker has a haunting vision on Halloween involving their new neighbor, the kids set out to prove the guy is really a monster.

programme.title: Jessie: The Ghostess With the Mostest

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Catch an Evil Bunny?
programme.desc: Coop and Cami discover someone close to them is leaking their ideas to a rival streaming channel. Family and friendships are tested when they set out to find the culprit.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: The Lyin' King

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Continued-A-Rooney

programme.title: Bunk'd: The Ones That Got Away
programme.desc: Emma and Xander are teamed up for the fishing competition and realize they have nothing in common. Zuri and Tiffany decide to steal their fish from the mess hall.
